title: 9cm Glass Salt & Pepper Set
features: Set Of Glass Salt & Pepper Shaker
Ideal For Pubs, Restaurants, Pizzerias, etc
description: Enhance your family table at home with the elegant looking salt & pepper set, perfect for those small family occasions. These jars are also suitable for all spices and seasoning such as salt, pepper, paprika etc. and are also good for the home pub and restaurant.
